ドコモとAGC、Low-Eガラス越しに屋外通信環境を革新する成功事例 #京都府 #NTTドコモ #AGC #5G通信

株式会社NTTドコモとAGCが、Low-Eガラスを通じた通信環境の改善に成功。新技術で5Gの受信信号が向上し、建物の窓が通信基地局化する可能性が広がります。

data.body:
I just saw a person speak negatively about a “no street shoes in the house” policy. 

I don’t know why, and it doesn’t really matter. There is no good reason to wear outside shoes inside the place where you live. 

YOU might think the reason is good, but it will not convince me. Argue with bacteria.
